channel.title: MW4 Launch Hub — News Feed
channel.description: Latest news, intel, and updates for Call of Duty: Modern Warfare 4

item.title: Call of Duty: Modern Warfare 4 Officially Announced
item.description: Activision has officially confirmed Call of Duty: Modern Warfare 4 with a stunning cinematic reveal trailer.

item.title: MW4 Confirmed for Xbox Game Pass on Day One
item.description: Microsoft confirms MW4 will be available on Game Pass from day one.

item.title: MW4 PC System Requirements Revealed
item.description: SSD required, DLSS 3.5 and FSR 3.1 supported at launch.
